meaning: vt.除去(或取出)...的肠子(或内脏等)
examples: We're currently in the process of redesigning Disembowel.
Urban myths abound about the birds being able to disembowel a man with their claws.
Mr Cecil told the BBC he would not stage the play again, because cuts ordered by the Media Council would "disembowel" the production, he said.
But a hunting ban may enthuse supporters in marginal suburban seats, where foxes can be portrayed as harmless furry animals, rather than (as the hunters have it) feral vermin that disembowel lambs.
